actionConfiguration.body:
INSERT INTO "Membre" ("Nom", "Prenom", "Telephone") 
VALUES ('{{input_nom.text}}', '{{input_prenom.text}}', '{{input_tel.text}}');

INSERT INTO "Membre" ("Nom", "Prenom", "Telephone") 
VALUES ('{{input_nom.text}}', '{{input_prenom.text}}', '{{input_tel.text}}');
SELECT * FROM "Tarif";
SELECT * FROM "Tarif";

WITH nouveau_membre AS (
	INSERT INTO public."Membre" (
		"Nom", 
		"Prenom", 
		"Sexe", 
		"Telephone",
		"Date_Naissance", 
		"Photo_Path", 
		"Date_Inscription"
	) 
	VALUES (
		'{{input_nom.text}}', 
		'{{input_prenom.text}}', 
		'{{Select_sexe.selectedOptionValue}}',
		'{{input_tel.text}}',
		NULLIF('{{date_naissance.formattedDate}}', '')::date, 
		'{{input_photo.files[0]?.data || "default_avatar.png"}}', 
		CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
	)
	RETURNING "ID_Membre", "Sexe"
)
INSERT INTO public."Inscription" (
	"ID_Membre", 
	"ID_Tarif", 
	"Date_Debut", 
	"Date_Fin", 
	"Frais_Paye" 
)
SELECT 
  n."ID_Membre", 
  (SELECT "ID_Tarif" FROM public."Tarif" 
	 WHERE "Sexe" = n."Sexe"
	 AND "Type_Abonnement" = '{{sel_type.selectedOptionValue}}' 
	 AND "Duree_Mois" = {{Number(sel_duree.selectedOptionValue || 1)}} 
	 AND "Avec_Coach" = {{sw_coach.isSwitchedOn}}::boolean 
	 LIMIT 1), 
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 
  '{{date_fin.formattedDate}}'::timestamp, 
  true 
FROM nouveau_membre n;

WITH nouveau_membre AS (
	INSERT INTO public."Membre" (
		"Nom", 
		"Prenom", 
		"Sexe", 
		"Telephone",
		"Date_Naissance", 
		"Photo_Path", 
		"Date_Inscription"
	) 
	VALUES (
		'{{input_nom.text}}', 
		'{{input_prenom.text}}', 
		'{{Select_sexe.selectedOptionValue}}',
		'{{input_tel.text}}',
		NULLIF('{{date_naissance.formattedDate}}', '')::date, 
		'{{input_photo.files[0]?.data || "default_avatar.png"}}', 
		CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
	)
	RETURNING "ID_Membre", "Sexe"
)
INSERT INTO public."Inscription" (
	"ID_Membre", 
	"ID_Tarif", 
	"Date_Debut", 
	"Date_Fin", 
	"Frais_Paye" 
)
SELECT 
  n."ID_Membre", 
  (SELECT "ID_Tarif" FROM public."Tarif" 
	 WHERE "Sexe" = n."Sexe"
	 AND "Type_Abonnement" = '{{sel_type.selectedOptionValue}}' 
	 AND "Duree_Mois" = {{Number(sel_duree.selectedOptionValue || 1)}} 
	 AND "Avec_Coach" = {{sw_coach.isSwitchedOn}}::boolean 
	 LIMIT 1), 
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 
  '{{date_fin.formattedDate}}'::timestamp, 
  true 
FROM nouveau_membre n;

SELECT 
  m."ID_Membre", 
  m."Nom", 
  m."Prenom", 
  m."Sexe", 
  m."Telephone", 
  m."Date_Inscription",
  m."Photo_Path",
  i."Date_Fin" -- On récupère enfin la date de fin !
FROM public."Membre" m
LEFT JOIN public."Inscription" i ON m."ID_Membre" = i."ID_Membre"
-- On s'assure de prendre la date de fin la plus récente si le membre s'est inscrit plusieurs fois
WHERE i."Date_Fin" = (
    SELECT MAX("Date_Fin") 
    FROM public."Inscription" 
    WHERE "ID_Membre" = m."ID_Membre"
) OR i."Date_Fin" IS NULL
ORDER BY m."Date_Inscription" DESC;

SELECT 
  m."ID_Membre", 
  m."Nom", 
  m."Prenom", 
  m."Sexe", 
  m."Telephone", 
  m."Date_Inscription",
  m."Photo_Path",
  i."Date_Fin" -- On récupère enfin la date de fin !
FROM public."Membre" m
LEFT JOIN public."Inscription" i ON m."ID_Membre" = i."ID_Membre"
-- On s'assure de prendre la date de fin la plus récente si le membre s'est inscrit plusieurs fois
WHERE i."Date_Fin" = (
    SELECT MAX("Date_Fin") 
    FROM public."Inscription" 
    WHERE "ID_Membre" = m."ID_Membre"
) OR i."Date_Fin" IS NULL
ORDER BY m."Date_Inscription" DESC;
SELECT count(*) as total FROM public."Membre";
SELECT count(*) as total FROM public."Membre";

INSERT INTO public."Inscription" (
  "ID_Membre", 
  "ID_Tarif", 
  "Date_Debut", 
  "Date_Fin", 
  "Frais_Paye"
)
SELECT 
  {{ Tableau_inscrit.selectedRow.ID_Membre }}, 
  "ID_Tarif", 
  '{{date_debut_modal.formattedDate}}'::date, 
  '{{date_fin_modal.formattedDate}}'::date, 
  true
FROM public."Tarif"
WHERE "Sexe" = '{{Tableau_inscrit.selectedRow.Sexe}}'
  AND "Type_Abonnement" = '{{sel_typeCopy.selectedOptionValue}}' 
  AND "Duree_Mois" = {{Number(sel_duree_modal.selectedOptionValue)}} 
  AND "Avec_Coach" = {{sw_coach_modal.isSwitchedOn}}::boolean
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO public."Inscription" (
  "ID_Membre", 
  "ID_Tarif", 
  "Date_Debut", 
  "Date_Fin", 
  "Frais_Paye"
)
SELECT 
  {{ Tableau_inscrit.selectedRow.ID_Membre }}, 
  "ID_Tarif", 
  '{{date_debut_modal.formattedDate}}'::date, 
  '{{date_fin_modal.formattedDate}}'::date, 
  true
FROM public."Tarif"
WHERE "Sexe" = '{{Tableau_inscrit.selectedRow.Sexe}}'
  AND "Type_Abonnement" = '{{sel_typeCopy.selectedOptionValue}}' 
  AND "Duree_Mois" = {{Number(sel_duree_modal.selectedOptionValue)}} 
  AND "Avec_Coach" = {{sw_coach_modal.isSwitchedOn}}::boolean
LIMIT 1;

(
  -- 1. LES ABONNEMENTS (Inscriptions)
  SELECT 
    TO_CHAR(i."Date_Debut", 'DD/MM HH24:MI:SS') as "Heure",
    'Abo: ' || m."Nom" || ' ' || m."Prenom" as "Action",
    t."Prix_Abonnement" as "Montant",
    i."Date_Debut"::timestamp as "Tri"
  FROM public."Inscription" i
  JOIN public."Membre" m ON i."ID_Membre" = m."ID_Membre"
  JOIN public."Tarif" t ON i."ID_Tarif" = t."ID_Tarif"

  UNION ALL 

  -- 2. LES VENTES BOUTIQUE
  SELECT 
    TO_CHAR(v."Date_Vente", 'DD/MM HH24:MI:SS') as "Heure",
    'Vente: ' || p."Nom_Produit" as "Action",
    v."Total_Vente" as "Montant",
    v."Date_Vente"::timestamp as "Tri"
  FROM public."VenteBoutique" v
  JOIN public."Produit" p ON v."ID_Produit" = p."ID_Produit"

  UNION ALL

  -- 3. LES DÉPENSES
  SELECT 
    TO_CHAR(d."Date_Depense", 'DD/MM HH24:MI:SS') as "Heure",
    'Frais: ' || d."Libelle_Depense" as "Action",
    d."Montant_Depense" * -1 as "Montant",
    d."Date_Depense"::timestamp as "Tri"
  FROM public."Depense" d
)
ORDER BY "Tri" DESC
LIMIT 5;

(
  -- 1. LES ABONNEMENTS (Inscriptions)
  SELECT 
    TO_CHAR(i."Date_Debut", 'DD/MM HH24:MI:SS') as "Heure",
    'Abo: ' || m."Nom" || ' ' || m."Prenom" as "Action",
    t."Prix_Abonnement" as "Montant",
    i."Date_Debut"::timestamp as "Tri"
  FROM public."Inscription" i
  JOIN public."Membre" m ON i."ID_Membre" = m."ID_Membre"
  JOIN public."Tarif" t ON i."ID_Tarif" = t."ID_Tarif"

  UNION ALL 

  -- 2. LES VENTES BOUTIQUE
  SELECT 
    TO_CHAR(v."Date_Vente", 'DD/MM HH24:MI:SS') as "Heure",
    'Vente: ' || p."Nom_Produit" as "Action",
    v."Total_Vente" as "Montant",
    v."Date_Vente"::timestamp as "Tri"
  FROM public."VenteBoutique" v
  JOIN public."Produit" p ON v."ID_Produit" = p."ID_Produit"

  UNION ALL

  -- 3. LES DÉPENSES
  SELECT 
    TO_CHAR(d."Date_Depense", 'DD/MM HH24:MI:SS') as "Heure",
    'Frais: ' || d."Libelle_Depense" as "Action",
    d."Montant_Depense" * -1 as "Montant",
    d."Date_Depense"::timestamp as "Tri"
  FROM public."Depense" d
)
ORDER BY "Tri" DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT m."Nom", i."Date_Fin", m."Telephone"
FROM public."Inscription" i
JOIN public."Membre" m ON i."ID_Membre" = m."ID_Membre"
WHERE i."Date_Fin" BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '3 days')
ORDER BY i."Date_Fin" ASC;

SELECT m."Nom", i."Date_Fin", m."Telephone"
FROM public."Inscription" i
JOIN public."Membre" m ON i."ID_Membre" = m."ID_Membre"
WHERE i."Date_Fin" BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '3 days')
ORDER BY i."Date_Fin" ASC;

SELECT 
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(t."Prix_Abonnement"), 0) 
     FROM public."Inscription" i
     JOIN public."Tarif" t ON i."ID_Tarif" = t."ID_Tarif"
     WHERE i."Date_Debut"::date = CURRENT_DATE) as "Total_Inscriptions",
     
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM("Total_Vente"), 0) 
     FROM public."VenteBoutique" 
     WHERE "Date_Vente"::date = CURRENT_DATE) as "Total_Ventes",
     
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM("Montant_Depense"), 0) 
     FROM public."Depense" 
     WHERE "Date_Depense"::date = CURRENT_DATE) as "Total_Depenses";

SELECT 
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(t."Prix_Abonnement"), 0) 
     FROM public."Inscription" i
     JOIN public."Tarif" t ON i."ID_Tarif" = t."ID_Tarif"
     WHERE i."Date_Debut"::date = CURRENT_DATE) as "Total_Inscriptions",
     
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM("Total_Vente"), 0) 
     FROM public."VenteBoutique" 
     WHERE "Date_Vente"::date = CURRENT_DATE) as "Total_Ventes",
     
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM("Montant_Depense"), 0) 
     FROM public."Depense" 
     WHERE "Date_Depense"::date = CURRENT_DATE) as "Total_Depenses";

SELECT p."Nom_Produit", SUM(v."Quantite") as "Total_Vendu"
FROM public."VenteBoutique" v
JOIN public."Produit" p ON v."ID_Produit" = p."ID_Produit"
GROUP BY p."Nom_Produit"
ORDER BY "Total_Vendu" DESC;

SELECT p."Nom_Produit", SUM(v."Quantite") as "Total_Vendu"
FROM public."VenteBoutique" v
JOIN public."Produit" p ON v."ID_Produit" = p."ID_Produit"
GROUP BY p."Nom_Produit"
ORDER BY "Total_Vendu" DESC;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM public."Membre";
SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM public."Membre";

SELECT 
    "Nom", 
    "Prenom", 
    "Telephone", 
    "Date_Fin"
FROM public."Membre" M
JOIN public."Inscription" I ON M."ID_Membre" = I."ID_Membre"
WHERE I."Date_Fin" BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '3 days')
-- On s'assure de ne prendre que la dernière inscription en date
AND I."ID_Inscription" = (
    SELECT MAX("ID_Inscription") 
    FROM public."Inscription" 
    WHERE "ID_Membre" = M."ID_Membre"
);

SELECT 
    "Nom", 
    "Prenom", 
    "Telephone", 
    "Date_Fin"
FROM public."Membre" M
JOIN public."Inscription" I ON M."ID_Membre" = I."ID_Membre"
WHERE I."Date_Fin" BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '3 days')
-- On s'assure de ne prendre que la dernière inscription en date
AND I."ID_Inscription" = (
    SELECT MAX("ID_Inscription") 
    FROM public."Inscription" 
    WHERE "ID_Membre" = M."ID_Membre"
);

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public."Inscription" 
WHERE "Date_Fin" >= CURRENT_DATE;

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public."Inscription" 
WHERE "Date_Fin" >= CURRENT_DATE;

(
 -- 1. BLOC MEMBRES (On récupère le prix via le sexe)
SELECT 
    TO_CHAR(m."Date_Inscription", 'DD/MM HH24:MI') as "Heure",
    'Inscrit: ' || m."Nom" || ' ' || m."Prenom" as "Action",
    (SELECT t."Prix_Abonnement" 
     FROM public."Tarif" t 
     WHERE t."Sexe" = m."Sexe" 
     LIMIT 1) as "Montant", -- On remplace le 0 par une recherche du prix
    m."Date_Inscription"::timestamp as "Tri"
FROM public."Membre" m


	UNION ALL 

	-- 2. LES VENTES BOUTIQUE
	SELECT 
	TO_CHAR(v."Date_Vente", 'DD/MM HH24:MI') as "Heure",
	'Vente: ' || p."Nom_Produit" as "Action",
	v."Total_Vente" as "Montant",
	v."Date_Vente" as "Tri"
	FROM public."VenteBoutique" v
	JOIN public."Produit" p ON v."ID_Produit" = p."ID_Produit"

	UNION ALL

	-- 3. LES DÉPENSES
	SELECT 
	TO_CHAR(d."Date_Depense", 'DD/MM HH24:MI') as "Heure",
	'Frais: ' || d."Libelle_Depense" as "Action",
	d."Montant_Depense" * -1 as "Montant",
	d."Date_Depense"::timestamp as "Tri"
	FROM public."Depense" d
)
ORDER BY "Tri" DESC, "Heure" DESC
LIMIT 5;
